1860     */
1861    public static function convertBackticksToDoubleQuotes(string $sql): string
1862    {
1863        return preg_replace_callback(
1864            '/`([^`]+)`/',
1865            function($matches) {
1866                $identifier = $matches[1];
1867                // 如果包含点号，分别处理每个部分
1868                if (str_contains($identifier, '.')) {
1869                    $parts = explode('.', $identifier);
1870                    return '"' . implode('"."', $parts) . '"';
1871                }
1872                return '"' . $identifier . '"';
1873            },
1874            $sql
1875        );
1876    }
1877    
1878    /**
1879     * PostgreSQL 保留字（常作为列名出现，在表达式中必须用双引号）
1880     * 与 SqlTrait::$special_fields 保持一致
1881     */
1882    private const PGSQL_RESERVED_WORDS = ['order', 'key', 'table', 'fields', 'group', 'user'];
1883
1884    /** 单次 select/query 最大加载行数，防止大结果集耗尽内存 */
1885    /** 单次 fetch 最大行数，避免 128M 等小内存下 OOM；超量请用 fetchIterator() 或 limit() */
1886    private const MAX_FETCH_ROWS = 50_000;
1887
1888    /**
1889     * 为表达式中未加引号的保留字加双引号，避免 syntax error
1890     * 匹配形如 CONCAT(a,b,order,c) 中作为标识符的 order
1891     */
1892    protected static function quoteReservedWordsInExpression(string $sql): string
1893    {
1894        foreach (self::PGSQL_RESERVED_WORDS as $word) {
1895            $pattern = '/([,(])\s*\b' . preg_quote($word, '/') . '\b\s*([,)])/i';
1896            $sql = preg_replace($pattern, '$1"' . $word . '"$2', $sql);
1897        }
1898        return $sql;
1899    }
1900
1901    /**
1902     * 统一处理 SQL：转换反引号为双引号，并将数据库名转换为 public schema，转换 MySQL 函数为 PostgreSQL 兼容函数
1903     * 
1904     * @param string $sql SQL 语句
1905     * @return string 转换后的 SQL
1906     */
1907    protected function normalizeSql(string $sql): string
1908    {
1909        // 1. 转换 SHOW FULL COLUMNS FROM 语法
1910        $sql = self::convertShowColumnsToInformationSchema($sql);
1911        
1912        // 2. 转换反引号为双引号
1913        $sql = self::convertBackticksToDoubleQuotes($sql);
1914        
1915        // 2.5 为表达式中未加引号的保留字加上双引号（如 CONCAT(a,b,order,c) 中的 order）
1916        $sql = self::quoteReservedWordsInExpression($sql);
1917        
1918        // 3. 处理直接传入的 SQL 字符串中的表名（仅用于 query() 方法直接传入的 SQL）
1919        // 注意：通过 table() 方法设置的表名已经在 formatTableNameForPgsql() 中处理，不需要这里处理
1920        // 这里只处理直接传入的 SQL 字符串中可能包含的数据库名
1921        $dbName = $this->db_name ?? 'public';
1922        if ($dbName !== 'public') {
1923            // 只处理未格式化的表名（直接传入的 SQL 中可能包含 database.table 格式）
1924            // 替换 database.table 为 "public"."table"（无引号的情况）
1925            $sql = preg_replace('/\b' . preg_quote($dbName, '/') . '\.([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\b/', '"public"."$1"', $sql);
1926        }
1927        
1928        // 🔧 修复：修复可能出现的双引号重复问题（防止意外情况）
1929        // 修复 "schema"".""table" 格式（三个连续的双引号，中间有点）
1930        $sql = preg_replace('/"([^"]+)""\."([^"]+)"/', '"$1"."$2"', $sql);
1931        // 修复 "schema""table" 格式（两个连续的双引号，中间没有点）
1932        $sql = preg_replace('/"([^"]+)""([^"]+)"/', '"$1"."$2"', $sql);
1933        // 修复连续的三个双引号：""." -> "."
1934        $sql = preg_replace('/""\."/', '".', $sql);
1935        
1936        // 4. 转换 MySQL 日期函数为 PostgreSQL 兼容函数
1937        $sql = $this->convertMysqlFunctionsToPostgresql($sql);
1938        
1939        return $sql;
1940    }
1941    
1942    /**
1943     * 转换 MySQL 日期/时间函数为 PostgreSQL 兼容函数
1944     * 
1945     * @param string $sql SQL 语句
1946     * @return string 转换后的 SQL
1947     */
1948    protected function convertMysqlFunctionsToPostgresql(string $sql): string
1949    {
1950        // CURDATE() -> CURRENT_DATE
1951        $sql = preg_replace('/\bCURDATE\s*\(\s*\)/i', 'CURRENT_DATE', $sql);
1952        
1953        // DATE(CURDATE()-1) -> (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day')
1954        // DATE(field) = DATE(CURDATE()-N) -> DATE(field) = (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 'N day')
1955        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE\s*\(\s*CURRENT_DATE\s*-\s*(\d+)\s*\)/i', "(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '$1 day')", $sql);
1956        
1957        // DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL N DAY) -> (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 'N day')
1958        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE_SUB\s*\(\s*CURRENT_DATE\s*,\s*INTERVAL\s+(\d+)\s+DAY\s*\)/i', "(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '$1 day')", $sql);
1959        
1960        // DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL N DAY) -> (NOW() - INTERVAL 'N day')
1961        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE_SUB\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*,\s*INTERVAL\s+(\d+)\s+DAY\s*\)/i', "(NOW() - INTERVAL '$1 day')", $sql);
1962        
1963        // DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL N WEEK) -> (NOW() - INTERVAL 'N week')
1964        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE_SUB\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*,\s*INTERVAL\s+(\d+)\s+WEEK\s*\)/i', "(NOW() - INTERVAL '$1 week')", $sql);
1965        
1966        // DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL N MONTH) -> (NOW() - INTERVAL 'N month')
1967        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE_SUB\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*,\s*INTERVAL\s+(\d+)\s+MONTH\s*\)/i', "(NOW() - INTERVAL '$1 month')", $sql);
1968        
1969        // DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL N QUARTER) -> (NOW() - INTERVAL 'N*3 month')
1970        $sql = preg_replace_callback('/DATE_SUB\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*,\s*INTERVAL\s+(\d+)\s+QUARTER\s*\)/i', function($matches) {
1971            $months = intval($matches[1]) * 3;
1972            return "(NOW() - INTERVAL '{$months} month')";
1973        }, $sql);
1974        
1975        // DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL N YEAR) -> (NOW() - INTERVAL 'N year')
1976        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE_SUB\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*,\s*INTERVAL\s+(\d+)\s+YEAR\s*\)/i', "(NOW() - INTERVAL '$1 year')", $sql);
1977        
1978        // TO_DAYS(field)=TO_DAYS(NOW()) -> DATE(field) = CURRENT_DATE
1979        $sql = preg_replace('/TO_DAYS\s*\(\s*([^)]+)\s*\)\s*=\s*TO_DAYS\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*\)/i', 'DATE($1) = CURRENT_DATE', $sql);
1980        
1981        // YEAR(field) -> EXTRACT(YEAR FROM field)
1982        $sql = preg_replace('/\bYEAR\s*\(\s*([^)]+)\s*\)/i', 'EXTRACT(YEAR FROM $1)', $sql);
1983        
1984        // QUARTER(field) -> EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM field)
1985        $sql = preg_replace('/\bQUARTER\s*\(\s*([^)]+)\s*\)/i', 'EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM $1)', $sql);
1986        
1987        // DATE_FORMAT(field, '%Y%m') -> TO_CHAR(field, 'YYYYMM')
1988        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE_FORMAT\s*\(\s*([^,]+)\s*,\s*[\'"]%Y%m[\'"]\s*\)/i', "TO_CHAR($1, 'YYYYMM')", $sql);
1989        
1990        // DATE_FORMAT(field, '%Y-%m-%d') -> TO_CHAR(field, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
1991        $sql = preg_replace('/DATE_FORMAT\s*\(\s*([^,]+)\s*,\s*[\'"]%Y-%m-%d[\'"]\s*\)/i', "TO_CHAR($1, 'YYYY-MM-DD')", $sql);
1992        
1993        // YEARWEEK(DATE_FORMAT(field,'%Y-%m-%d')) = YEARWEEK(NOW()) -> TO_CHAR(field, 'IYYY-IW') = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'IYYY-IW')
1994        $sql = preg_replace('/YEARWEEK\s*\(\s*TO_CHAR\s*\(\s*([^,]+)\s*,\s*[\'"]YYYY-MM-DD[\'"]\s*\)\s*\)\s*=\s*YEARWEEK\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*\)/i', 
1995            "TO_CHAR($1, 'IYYY-IW') = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'IYYY-IW')", $sql);
1996        
1997        // YEARWEEK(DATE_FORMAT(field,'%Y-%m-%d')) = YEARWEEK(NOW())-N -> TO_CHAR(field, 'IYYY-IW') = TO_CHAR(NOW() - INTERVAL 'N week', 'IYYY-IW')
1998        $sql = preg_replace('/YEARWEEK\s*\(\s*TO_CHAR\s*\(\s*([^,]+)\s*,\s*[\'"]YYYY-MM-DD[\'"]\s*\)\s*\)\s*=\s*YEARWEEK\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*\)\s*-\s*(\d+)/i', 
1999            "TO_CHAR($1, 'IYYY-IW') = TO_CHAR(NOW() - INTERVAL '$2 week', 'IYYY-IW')", $sql);
2000        
2001        // PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y%m'),DATE_FORMAT(field,'%Y%m')) = N 
2002        // -> (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW()) * 12 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())) - (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM field) * 12 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM field)) = N
2003        // 简化处理：转换为 TO_CHAR 比较
2004        $sql = preg_replace('/PERIOD_DIFF\s*\(\s*TO_CHAR\s*\(\s*NOW\s*\(\s*\)\s*,\s*[\'"]YYYYMM[\'"]\s*\)\s*,\s*TO_CHAR\s*\(\s*([^,]+)\s*,\s*[\'"]YYYYMM[\'"]\s*\)\s*\)\s*=\s*(\d+)/i', 
2005            "TO_CHAR($1, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(NOW() - INTERVAL '$2 month', 'YYYY-MM')", $sql);
2006        
2007        return $sql;
2008    }
2009    
2010    /**
2011     * 转换参数名：PostgreSQL 要求参数名必须以字母开头
2012     * 如果参数名是 32 位 MD5 哈希且以数字开头，添加 'p' 前缀
2013     * 
2014     * @param string $sql SQL 语句
2015     * @return string 转换后的 SQL
2016     */
2017    protected function normalizeParameterNames(string $sql): string
2018    {
2019        // 🔧 修复：PostgreSQL 参数名必须是字母数字下划线，不能包含特殊字符
2020        // 转换 SQL 中的所有参数名，确保符合 PostgreSQL 要求
2021        // 处理顺序：先移除特殊字符，再检查数字开头（与 normalizeParameterArray 完全一致）
2022        return preg_replace_callback('/:([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)/', function($matches) {
2023            $paramName = $matches[1];
2024            // 先移除所有非字母数字下划线的字符
2025            $paramName = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '_', $paramName);
2026            // 如果参数名以数字开头，添加 'p' 前缀
2027            if (preg_match('/^[0-9]/', $paramName)) {
2028                return ':p' . $paramName;
2029            }
2030            return ':' . $paramName;
2031        }, $sql);
2032    }
2033    
2034    /**
2035     * 转换参数数组：PostgreSQL 要求参数名必须以字母开头
2036     * 
2037     * @param array|null $params 参数数组
2038     * @return array|null 转换后的参数数组
2039     */
2040    protected function normalizeParameterArray(?array $params): ?array
2041    {
2042        if ($params === null) {
2043            return null;
2044        }
2045        
2046        $convertedParams = [];
2047        foreach ($params as $paramName => $value) {
2048            // 🔧 修复：确保参数名符合 PostgreSQL 要求（只包含字母数字下划线）
2049            // 移除 ':' 前缀（如果有）
2050            $paramNameWithoutColon = str_starts_with($paramName, ':') ? substr($paramName, 1) : $paramName;
2051            // 移除所有非字母数字下划线的字符
2052            $paramNameClean = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '_', $paramNameWithoutColon);
2053            // 如果参数名以数字开头，添加 'p' 前缀
2054            if (preg_match('/^[0-9]/', $paramNameClean)) {
2055                $paramNameClean = 'p' . $paramNameClean;
2056            }
2057            $normalizedParamName = ':' . $paramNameClean;
2058            // 直接使用规范化后的参数名
2059            $convertedParams[$normalizedParamName] = $value;
2060        }
2061        
2062        return $convertedParams;
2063    }
2064
2065    /**
2066     * 精确替换 SQL 占位符，避免 :param1 误替换到 :param10。
2067     */
2068    protected function replaceSqlPlaceholder(string $sql, string $from, string $to): string
2069    {
2070        $pattern = '/(?<![A-Za-z0-9_])' . preg_quote($from, '/') . '(?![A-Za-z0-9_])/';
2071        return (string)preg_replace($pattern, $to, $sql);
2072    }
2073    
2074    
2075    /**
2076     * PostgreSQL 适配的 prepare 方法
2077     * 在调用 PDO prepare 之前规范化 SQL 和参数名，并包装返回的 PDOStatement
2078     * 
2079     * @param string $sql SQL 语句
2080     * @param array $options PDO prepare 选项
2081     * @return \PDOStatement|false 包装后的 PDOStatement 或 false
2082     */
2083    protected function preparePgsql(string $sql, array $options = []): \PDOStatement|false
2084    {
2085        // 🔧 修复：规范化 SQL（反引号、数据库名、MySQL 函数转换）
2086        $sql = $this->normalizeSql($sql);
2087        
2088        // 🔧 修复：规范化参数数组（确保参数名符合 PostgreSQL 要求）
2089        $this->bound_values = $this->normalizeParameterArray($this->bound_values);
2090        
2091        // 🔧 修复：强制更新 SQL 中的参数名以匹配规范化后的 bound_values
2092        // 问题原因：原条件判断可能在某些情况下（如重复调用）跳过更新
2093        // 解决方案：直接用 bound_values 的键来替换 SQL 中的参数名
2094        if (!empty($this->bound_values)) {
2095            foreach ($this->bound_values as $newParam => $value) {
2096                // 如果 bound_values 的键以 ':p' 开头（添加了 p 前缀），说明原参数以数字开头
2097                // 需要将 SQL 中的原始形式（去掉 p 前缀）替换为新形式
2098                if (str_starts_with($newParam, ':p') && strlen($newParam) > 2) {
2099                    $originalParam = ':' . substr($newParam, 2);
2100                    $sql = $this->replaceSqlPlaceholder($sql, $originalParam, $newParam);
2101                }
2102            }
2103        }
2104        
2105        // ⚠️ 不再调用 normalizeParameterNames（避免双重规范化）
2106        // normalizeParameterArray 已将 bound_values 规范化；
2107        // preparePgsql/bindValue 的手动映射 + 单词边界替换已确保 SQL 与 bound_values 一致
2108        
2109        // 保持对象状态一致：后续回退到 exec() 时，SQL 占位符必须与 bound_values 键一致
2110        $this->sql = $sql;
2111        
2112        // 尝试 prepare，如果失败则检查是否是多个命令的错误
2113        $stmt = @$this->getLink()->prepare($sql, $options);
2114        if ($stmt === false) {
2115            $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2116            $errorCode = $errorInfo[0] ?? '';
2117            $errorMessage = $errorInfo[2] ?? '';
2118            
2119            // 检查是否是"不能插入多个命令"的错误
2120            if ($errorCode === '42601' && 
2121                (str_contains($errorMessage, 'cannot insert multiple commands') || 
2122                 str_contains($errorMessage, 'multiple commands'))) {
2123                throw new \PDOException(
2124                    "PostgreSQL prepared statements cannot contain multiple SQL commands. " .
2125                    "Use exec() for multiple statements or split them into separate calls. " .
2126                    "SQL preview: " . substr($sql, 0, 200),
2127                    (int)$errorCode
2128                );
2129            }
2130            return false;
2131        }
2132        
2133        // 直接返回原始 PDOStatement
2134        return $stmt;
2135    }
2136    
2137    /**
2138     * PostgreSQL 适配的 exec 方法
2139     * 在调用 PDO exec 之前规范化 SQL
2140     * 
2141     * @param string $sql SQL 语句
2142     * @return int|false 受影响的行数或 false
2143     */
2144    protected function execPgsql(string $sql): int|false
2145    {
2146        // 🔧 修复：规范化 SQL 和 bound_values，确保参数名一致
2147        // 批量插入时 SQL 末尾有分号，需要先规范化
2148        $this->bound_values = $this->normalizeParameterArray($this->bound_values);
2149        foreach ($this->bound_values as $newParam => $value) {
2150            if (str_starts_with($newParam, ':p') && strlen($newParam) > 2) {
2151                $originalParam = ':' . substr($newParam, 2);
2152                $sql = $this->replaceSqlPlaceholder($sql, $originalParam, $newParam);
2153            }
2154        }
2155        $sql = $this->normalizeSql($sql);
2156        
2157        return $this->getLink()->exec($sql);
2158    }
2159    
2160    /**
2161     * PostgreSQL 适配的 query 方法
2162     * 在调用 PDO query 之前规范化 SQL，并包装返回的 PDOStatement
2163     * 
2164     * @param string $sql SQL 语句
2165     * @param int|null $fetchMode 获取模式
2166     * @param mixed ...$fetchModeArgs 获取模式参数
2167     * @return \PDOStatement|false 包装后的 PDOStatement 或 false
2168     */
2169    protected function queryPgsql(string $sql, ?int $fetchMode = null, ...$fetchModeArgs): \PDOStatement|false
2170    {
2171        // 🔧 修复：规范化 SQL（反引号、数据库名、MySQL 函数转换）
2172        $sql = $this->normalizeSql($sql);
2173        
2174        $stmt = $this->getLink()->query($sql, $fetchMode, ...$fetchModeArgs);
2175        if ($stmt === false) {
2176            return false;
2177        }
2178        
2179        // 直接返回原始 PDOStatement
2180        return $stmt;
2181    }
2182    
2183    /**
2184     * 检查 SQL 是否包含多个命令（用分号分隔）
2185     * 排除字符串中的分号（单引号、双引号中的分号）
2186     * PostgreSQL 的 prepared statement 不支持多个 SQL 命令
2187     * 
2188     * @param string $sql SQL 语句
2189     * @return bool 如果包含多个命令返回 true，否则返回 false
2190     */
2191    protected function hasMultipleSqlCommands(string $sql): bool
2192    {
2193        // 移除字符串中的分号（单引号和双引号中的分号）
2194        $sqlWithoutStrings = preg_replace_callback(
2195            '/(["\'])(?:(?=(\\\\?))\2.)*?\1/',
2196            function ($matches) {
2197                // 将字符串中的分号替换为占位符
2198                return str_replace(';', '___SEMICOLON_PLACEHOLDER___', $matches[0]);
2199            },
2200            $sql
2201        );
2202        
2203        // 计算分号数量（排除末尾的分号）
2204        $trimmedSql = rtrim(trim($sqlWithoutStrings), ';');
2205        $semicolonCount = substr_count($trimmedSql, ';');
2206        
2207        // 如果有分号，说明包含多个命令
2208        return $semicolonCount > 0;
2209    }
2210    
2211    /**
2212     * 重写 fetch 方法，处理 PostgreSQL 不支持多个 SQL 命令的限制
2213     * 如果 SQL 包含多个命令，使用 exec() 而不是 prepare/execute
2214     */
2215    public function fetch(string $model_class = ''): mixed
2216    {
2217        $traceOperation = $this->fetch_type ?: 'query';
2218        $traceTable = $this->table !== '' ? $this->table : 'unknown';
2219        $dbTraceLabel = 'db::' . $traceOperation . '::' . $traceTable;
2220        $dbTraceStart = 0.0;
2221        $dbTraceSql = '';
2222        if (RequestLifecycleTrace::isEnabled()) {
2223            $dbTraceStart = microtime(true);
2224            try {
2225                $dbTraceSql = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2226            } catch (\Throwable) {
2227                $dbTraceSql = $this->sql;
2228            }
2229        }
2230        try {
2231            try {
2232        // 在执行前检查是否包含多个 SQL 命令
2233        // PostgreSQL 的 prepared statement 不支持多个 SQL 命令
2234        if (!empty($this->sql)) {
2235            $hasMultipleCommands = $this->hasMultipleSqlCommands($this->sql);
2236            
2237            // 如果是批量插入，完全在这里处理，避免父类再次执行
2238            if ($this->batch && $this->fetch_type == 'insert') {
2239                $hasReturning = stripos($this->sql, 'RETURNING') !== false;
2240                
2241                if ($hasMultipleCommands) {
2242                    // 多个命令，即使有 RETURNING 也不能使用 prepare/execute
2243                    // 使用 exec() 执行，但无法获取 RETURNING 结果
2244                    // 🔧 修复：规范化 SQL 和 bound_values，确保参数名一致后再调用 getSqlWithBounds
2245                    $this->bound_values = $this->normalizeParameterArray($this->bound_values);
2246                    foreach ($this->bound_values as $newParam => $value) {
2247                        if (str_starts_with($newParam, ':p') && strlen($newParam) > 2) {
2248                            $originalParam = ':' . substr($newParam, 2);
2249                            $this->sql = $this->replaceSqlPlaceholder($this->sql, $originalParam, $newParam);
2250                        }
2251                    }
2252                    $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2253                    $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2254                    if ($result === false) {
2255                        $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2256                        throw new \PDOException(
2257                            $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2258                            (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
2259                        );
2260                    }
2261                    // 获取最后插入的 ID
2262                    $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2263                    // 创建一个假的 PDOStatement，返回插入的 ID
2264                    $this->PDOStatement = new class($lastId, $this->identity_field) extends \PDOStatement {
2265                        private $lastId;
2266                        private $identityField;
2267                        public function __construct($lastId, $identityField) {
2268                            $this->lastId = $lastId;
2269                            $this->identityField = $identityField;
2270                        }
2271                        public function execute(?array $params = null): bool { return true; }
2272                        public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { 
2273                            return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2274                        }
2275                        public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2276                    };
2277                    // 清空 SQL，避免父类再次执行
2278                    $this->sql = '';
2279                    $this->batch = false;
2280                } elseif ($hasReturning) {
2281                    // 单个命令且有 RETURNING，尝试使用 prepare/execute
2282                    // 但先尝试 prepare，如果失败（可能是多个命令），回退到 exec()
2283                    try {
2284                            $testStmt = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2285                        if ($testStmt === false) {
2286                            // prepare 返回 false，检查错误信息
2287                            $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2288                            if (($errorInfo[0] ?? '') === '42601') {
2289                                // 多个命令错误，使用 exec()
2290                                $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2291                                $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2292                                if ($result === false) {
2293                                    throw new \PDOException(
2294                                        $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2295                                        (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
2296                                    );
2297                                }
2298                                $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2299                                $this->PDOStatement = new class($lastId, $this->identity_field) extends \PDOStatement {
2300                                    private $lastId;
2301                                    private $identityField;
2302                                    public function __construct($lastId, $identityField) {
2303                                        $this->lastId = $lastId;
2304                                        $this->identityField = $identityField;
2305                                    }
2306                                    public function execute(?array $params = null): bool { return true; }
2307                                    public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { 
2308                                        return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2309                                    }
2310                                    public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2311                            };
2312                            $this->sql = '';
2313                            $this->batch = false;
2314                        } else {
2315                            // 其他错误，抛出异常
2316                                throw new \PDOException(
2317                                    $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL preparation failed',
2318                                    (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
2319                                );
2320                            }
2321                        } else {
2322                            // prepare 成功，执行
2323                            $this->PDOStatement = $testStmt;
2324                            $this->PDOStatement->execute($this->bound_values);
2325                            // 执行成功，不需要清空 SQL，让父类处理结果
2326                        }
2327                    } catch (\PDOException $e) {
2328                        $errorCode = $e->getCode();
2329                        $errorMessage = $e->getMessage();
2330                        // ON CONFLICT 无匹配约束（42P10）：表可能无联合主键/唯一约束，回退为普通 INSERT
2331                        if ($errorCode == '42P10' ||
2332                            str_contains($errorMessage, 'there is no unique or exclusion constraint matching the ON CONFLICT specification') ||
2333                            str_contains($errorMessage, 'ON CONFLICT specification')) {
2334                            $sqlWithoutConflict = preg_replace('/\s+ON CONFLICT\s+\([^)]+\)\s+(?:DO UPDATE SET|DO NOTHING)[^;]*/i', '', $this->sql);
2335                            $sqlWithoutConflict = preg_replace('/\s+RETURNING\s+[^;]+/i', '', $sqlWithoutConflict);
2336                            $this->sql = trim($sqlWithoutConflict);
2337                            $this->PDOStatement = null;
2338                            $testStmt = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2339                            if ($testStmt === false) {
2340                                throw new \PDOException(
2341                                    __('无法回退到普通插入：SQL 准备失败'),
2342                                    (int)$errorCode,
2343                                    $e
2344                                );
2345                            }
2346                            $this->PDOStatement = $testStmt;
2347                            $this->PDOStatement->execute($this->bound_values);
2348                        } elseif (str_contains($errorMessage, 'cannot insert multiple commands') ||
2349                            str_contains($errorMessage, 'multiple commands') ||
2350                            ($errorCode === '42601')) {
2351                            // 如果 prepare 抛出异常（可能是多个命令），回退到 exec()
2352                            $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2353                            $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2354                            if ($result === false) {
2355                                $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2356                                throw new \PDOException(
2357                                    $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2358                                    (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0),
2359                                    $e
2360                                );
2361                            }
2362                            $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2363                            $this->PDOStatement = new class($lastId, $this->identity_field) extends \PDOStatement {
2364                                private $lastId;
2365                                private $identityField;
2366                                public function __construct($lastId, $identityField) {
2367                                    $this->lastId = $lastId;
2368                                    $this->identityField = $identityField;
2369                                }

2371                                public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { 
2372                                    return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2373                                }
2374                                public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2375                            };
2376                            $this->sql = '';
2377                            $this->batch = false;
2378                        } else {
2379                            throw $e;
2380                        }
2381                    }
2382                } else {
2383                    // 没有 RETURNING，但可能包含多个命令（虽然检测说没有，但作为备用）
2384                    // 先尝试 prepare，如果失败则使用 exec()
2385                    try {
2386                            $testStmt = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2387                        if ($testStmt === false) {
2388                            $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2389                            if (($errorInfo[0] ?? '') === '42601') {
2390                                // prepare 失败，使用 exec()
2391                                $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2392                                $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2393                                if ($result === false) {
2394                                    throw new \PDOException(
2395                                        $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2396                                        (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
2397                                    );
2398                                }
2399                                $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();

2401                                    private $lastId;

2404                                        $this->lastId = $lastId;
2405                                        $this->identityField = $identityField;
2406                                    }

2409                                        return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2410                                    }
2411                                    public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2412                                };

2414                                $this->batch = false;
2415                            }
2416                        }
2417                    } catch (\PDOException $e) {
2418                        if (str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'cannot insert multiple commands') || 
2419                            str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'multiple commands') ||

2422                            $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);

2424                                $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();

2426                                    $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2427                                    (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0),
2428                                    $e
2429                                );
2430                            }
2431                            $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2432                            $this->PDOStatement = new class($lastId, $this->identity_field) extends \PDOStatement {
2433                                private $lastId;

2436                                    $this->lastId = $lastId;

2438                                }

2444                            };

2448                            throw $e;
2449                        }
2450                    }
2451                }
2452                
2453                // 批量插入已处理，如果已经设置了 PDOStatement 且 SQL 已清空，直接调用父类处理结果
2454                // 否则让父类处理（父类会检查并执行）
2455                if ($this->PDOStatement !== null && empty($this->sql)) {
2456                    // 已经执行了 SQL，设置 batch = false 避免父类再次执行批量插入逻辑
2457                    $this->batch = false;
2458                    // 直接调用父类处理结果
2459                    return parent::fetch($model_class);
2460                }
2461            } elseif ($hasMultipleCommands) {
2462                // 非批量操作，但包含多个命令
2463                $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2464                
2465                try {
2466                    $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2467                    if ($result === false) {
2468                        $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2469                        throw new \PDOException(
2470                            $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2471                            (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
2472                        );
2473                    }
2474                    
2475                    // 对于 INSERT 操作，获取插入的 ID
2476                    if ($this->fetch_type == 'insert' && $this->identity_field) {
2477                        $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2478                        // 创建一个假的 PDOStatement，返回插入的 ID，以便父类可以继续处理
2479                        $this->PDOStatement = new class($lastId, $this->identity_field) extends \PDOStatement {
2480                            private $lastId;
2481                            private $identityField;

2483                                $this->lastId = $lastId;
2484                                $this->identityField = $identityField;
2485                            }

2487                            public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { 
2488                                return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2489                            }
2490                            public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2491                        };
2492                    } else {
2493                        // 创建一个假的 PDOStatement，返回空结果
2494                        $this->PDOStatement = new class extends \PDOStatement {
2495                            public function execute(?array $params = null): bool { return true; }
2496                            public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { return []; }
2497                            public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2498                        };
2499                    }

2501                    $this->batch = false;

2503                    // 检查是否是"不能插入多个命令"的错误（虽然我们已经检测过了，但作为备用）
2504                    if (str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'cannot insert multiple commands') || 
2505                        str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'multiple commands')) {
2506                        throw new \PDOException(
2507                            "PostgreSQL prepared statements cannot contain multiple SQL commands. " .
2508                            "Use exec() for multiple statements or split them into separate calls. " .

2510                            (int)$e->getCode(),
2511                            $e
2512                        );
2513                    }
2514                    throw $e;
2515                }
2516            } else {
2517                // 单个命令，但在 prepare 时可能失败（作为备用检测）
2518                // 在父类调用 prepare 之前，先尝试 prepare 看看是否会失败
2519                
2520                try {
2521                    $testStmt = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2522                    if ($testStmt === false) {
2523                        $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2524                        if (($errorInfo[0] ?? '') === '42601' && 
2525                            (str_contains($errorInfo[2] ?? '', 'cannot insert multiple commands') || 
2526                             str_contains($errorInfo[2] ?? '', 'multiple commands'))) {
2527                            // prepare 失败，说明包含多个命令，使用 exec()
2528                            $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2529                            $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2530                            if ($result === false) {
2531                                throw new \PDOException(
2532                                    $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2533                                    (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
2534                                );
2535                            }
2536                            if ($this->fetch_type == 'insert' && $this->identity_field) {
2537                                $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();

2539                                    private $lastId;
2540                                    private $identityField;

2547                                        return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2548                                    }
2549                                    public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2550                                };
2551                                $this->sql = '';
2552                                $this->batch = false;
2553                            } else {
2554                                $this->PDOStatement = new class extends \PDOStatement {

2558                                };

2560                            }
2561                        }
2562                    }
2563                } catch (\PDOException $e) {
2564                    // prepare 时抛出异常，检查是否是多个命令错误
2565                    if (str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'cannot insert multiple commands') || 
2566                        str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'multiple commands') ||
2567                        ($e->getCode() === '42601')) {
2568                        // 使用 exec() 执行
2569                        $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2570                        $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2571                        if ($result === false) {
2572                            $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2573                            throw new \PDOException(
2574                                $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2575                                (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0),
2576                                $e
2577                            );
2578                        }
2579                        if ($this->fetch_type == 'insert' && $this->identity_field) {
2580                            $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2581                            $this->PDOStatement = new class($lastId, $this->identity_field) extends \PDOStatement {
2582                                private $lastId;
2583                                private $identityField;
2584                                public function __construct($lastId, $identityField) {
2585                                    $this->lastId = $lastId;
2586                                    $this->identityField = $identityField;
2587                                }

2589                                public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { 
2590                                    return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2591                                }
2592                                public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2593                            };
2594                            $this->sql = '';
2595                            $this->batch = false;
2596                        } else {
2597                            $this->PDOStatement = new class extends \PDOStatement {
2598                                public function execute(?array $params = null): bool { return true; }
2599                                public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { return []; }
2600                                public function nextRowset(): bool { return false; }
2601                            };
2602                            $this->sql = '';
2603                        }
2604                    }
2605                    // 其他错误不处理，让父类处理
2606                }
2607            }
2608        }
2609        
2610        // 🔧 修复：PostgreSQL 不支持 nextRowset()，完全重写 fetch 方法，不调用父类
2611        
2612        // Development SQL logging
2613        if (Env::get('log.dev_sql.enabled', false)) {
2614            $log_file = Env::get('log.dev_sql.file', 'dev_sql');
2615            $sqlWithValues = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2616            Env::log($log_file, $sqlWithValues, 'QUERY', true, true, 0);
2617        }
2618        
2619        // Database query logging
2620        if (Env::get('log.db.enabled', false)) {
2621            $file = Env::get('log.db.file', 'db');
2622            $sqlWithValues = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2623            Env::log($file, $sqlWithValues, 'QUERY', true, true, 0);
2624        }
2625        
2626        # 调试环境信息
2627        if (DEV && Debug::target('pre_fetch')) {
2628            $msg = __('即将执行信息：') . PHP_EOL;
2629            $msg .= '$this->batch:' . ($this->batch ? 'true' : 'false') . PHP_EOL;
2630            $msg .= '$this->fetch_type:' . $this->fetch_type . PHP_EOL;
2631            $msg .= '$this->sql:' . $this->sql . PHP_EOL;
2632            $msg .= '$this->bound_values:' . json_encode($this->bound_values) . PHP_EOL;
2633            $msg .= 'Format SQL:' . $this->getSql(true);
2634            Debug::target('pre_fetch', $msg);
2635        }
2636        
2637        // 如果 PDOStatement 已经设置且 SQL 已清空，说明已经执行过了，直接处理结果
2638        if ($this->PDOStatement !== null && empty($this->sql)) {
2639            // 已经执行了 SQL，直接处理结果
2640            return $this->processFetchResult($model_class);
2641        }
2642        
2643        // 🔧 修复：在执行 INSERT 时，如果遇到 ON CONFLICT 错误（42P10），回退到普通插入
2644        if ($this->fetch_type == 'insert' && !empty($this->exist_update_sql) && stripos($this->sql, 'ON CONFLICT') !== false) {
2645            try {
2646                // 先尝试执行带 ON CONFLICT 的 SQL
2647                if ($this->PDOStatement === null && !empty($this->sql)) {
2648                    $this->PDOStatement = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2649                }
2650                if ($this->PDOStatement !== null) {
2651                    $this->PDOStatement->execute($this->bound_values);
2652                }
2653                return $this->processFetchResult($model_class);
2654            } catch (\PDOException $e) {
2655                // 检查是否是 ON CONFLICT 错误（42P10: Invalid column reference）
2656                $errorCode = $e->getCode();
2657                $errorMessage = $e->getMessage();
2658                if ($errorCode == '42P10' || 
2659                    str_contains($errorMessage, 'there is no unique or exclusion constraint matching the ON CONFLICT specification') ||
2660                    str_contains($errorMessage, 'ON CONFLICT specification')) {
2661                    // 回退到普通插入：移除 ON CONFLICT 子句
2662                    $sqlWithoutConflict = preg_replace('/\s+ON CONFLICT\s+\([^)]+\)\s+(?:DO UPDATE SET|DO NOTHING)[^;]*/i', '', $this->sql);
2663                    // 移除 RETURNING 子句（如果有），因为普通插入可能不需要
2664                    $sqlWithoutConflict = preg_replace('/\s+RETURNING\s+[^;]+/i', '', $sqlWithoutConflict);
2665                    $this->sql = trim($sqlWithoutConflict);
2666                    
2667                    // 清除旧的 PDOStatement 和 bound_values（如果需要）
2668                    $this->PDOStatement = null;
2669                    
2670                    // 重新准备语句
2671                    $this->PDOStatement = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2672                    if ($this->PDOStatement === false) {
2673                        throw new \PDOException(
2674                            __('无法回退到普通插入：SQL 准备失败'),
2675                            (int)$errorCode,
2676                            $e
2677                        );
2678                    }
2679                    // 重新执行
2680                    $this->PDOStatement->execute($this->bound_values);
2681                    return $this->processFetchResult($model_class);
2682                }
2683                // 其他错误，继续抛出
2684                throw $e;
2685            }
2686        }
2687        
2688        // 处理批量插入
2689        if ($this->batch && $this->fetch_type == 'insert') {
2690            $hasReturning = stripos($this->sql, 'RETURNING') !== false;
2691            $hasMultipleCommands = $this->hasMultipleSqlCommands($this->sql);
2692            
2693            if ($hasMultipleCommands || !$hasReturning) {
2694                // 多个命令或没有 RETURNING，使用 exec()
2695                $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($this->sql);
2696                $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
2697                if ($result === false) {
2698                    $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
2699                    throw new \PDOException(
2700                        $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
2701                        (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
2702                    );
2703                }
2704                $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2705                $this->PDOStatement = new class($lastId, $this->identity_field) extends \PDOStatement {
2706                    private $lastId;
2707                    private $identityField;
2708                    public function __construct($lastId, $identityField) {
2709                        $this->lastId = $lastId;
2710                        $this->identityField = $identityField;
2711                    }
2712                    public function execute(?array $params = null): bool { return true; }
2713                    public function fetchAll(int $mode = \PDO::FETCH_DEFAULT, ...$args): array { 
2714                        return [[$this->identityField => $this->lastId]]; 
2715                    }
2716                    public function rowCount(): int { return 1; }
2717                };
2718                $this->sql = '';
2719                $this->batch = false;
2720            } else {
2721                // 单个命令且有 RETURNING，使用 prepare/execute
2722                try {
2723                    $this->PDOStatement = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2724                    $this->PDOStatement->execute($this->bound_values);
2725                    $this->batch = false;
2726                } catch (\PDOException $e) {
2727                    // 🔧 修复：检查是否是 ON CONFLICT 错误（42P10），回退到普通插入
2728                    $errorCode = $e->getCode();
2729                    $errorMessage = $e->getMessage();
2730                    if ($errorCode == '42P10' || 
2731                        str_contains($errorMessage, 'there is no unique or exclusion constraint matching the ON CONFLICT specification') ||
2732                        str_contains($errorMessage, 'ON CONFLICT specification')) {
2733                        // 回退到普通插入：移除 ON CONFLICT 子句
2734                        $sqlWithoutConflict = preg_replace('/\s+ON CONFLICT\s+\([^)]+\)\s+(?:DO UPDATE SET|DO NOTHING)[^;]*/i', '', $this->sql);
2735                        // 移除 RETURNING 子句（如果有），因为普通插入可能不需要
2736                        $sqlWithoutConflict = preg_replace('/\s+RETURNING\s+[^;]+/i', '', $sqlWithoutConflict);
2737                        $this->sql = trim($sqlWithoutConflict);
2738                        
2739                        // 清除旧的 PDOStatement
2740                        $this->PDOStatement = null;
2741                        
2742                        // 重新准备语句
2743                        $this->PDOStatement = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2744                        if ($this->PDOStatement === false) {
2745                            throw new \PDOException(
2746                                __('无法回退到普通插入：SQL 准备失败'),
2747                                (int)$errorCode,
2748                                $e
2749                            );
2750                        }
2751                        // 重新执行
2752                        $this->PDOStatement->execute($this->bound_values);
2753                        $this->batch = false;
2754                    } else {
2755                        throw $e;
2756                    }
2757                }
2758            }
2759        } elseif (!empty($this->sql)) {
2760            // 检查是否包含多个 SQL 命令
2761            $hasMultipleCommands = $this->hasMultipleSqlCommands($this->sql);
2762            
2763            if ($hasMultipleCommands) {
2764                // 多个命令，拆分为单独的查询执行
2765                return $this->executeMultipleCommands($model_class);
2766            } else {
2767                // 单个命令，正常执行
2768                try {
2769                    $this->PDOStatement = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
2770                    $this->PDOStatement->execute($this->bound_values);
2771                } catch (\PDOException $e) {
2772                    throw $e;
2773                }
2774            }
2775        }
2776        
2777        // 处理结果
2778        return $this->processFetchResult($model_class);
2779            } finally {
2780                if ($dbTraceStart > 0.0) {
2781                    $duration = (microtime(true) - $dbTraceStart) * 1000;
2782                    if ($duration < 0) {
2783                        $duration = 0;
2784                    }
2785                    RequestLifecycleTrace::recordSpan(
2786                        $dbTraceLabel,
2787                        $duration,
2788                        'db',
2789                        null,
2790                        [
2791                            'sql' => $dbTraceSql,
2792                            'operation' => $traceOperation,
2793                            'table' => $traceTable,
2794                        ]
2795                    );
2796                }
2797            }
2798        } catch (\PDOException $e) {
2799            // PostgreSQL：任意 SQL 失败后连接进入 aborted 状态，必须 ROLLBACK 才能恢复；
2800            // 否则后续操作（含 BEGIN）均报 25P02。在 rethrow 前统一 rollBack 以恢复连接。
2801            $this->rollBack();
2802            throw $e;
2803        }
2804    }
2805    
2806    private function safeLastInsertId(): ?string
2807    {
2808        try {
2809            $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
2810        } catch (\PDOException $exception) {
2811            $code = (string)$exception->getCode();
2812            $message = (string)$exception->getMessage();
2813            if ($code === '55000' || \str_contains($message, 'lastval is not yet defined in this session')) {
2814                return null;
2815            }
2816
2817            throw $exception;
2818        }
2819
2820        if ($lastId === false || $lastId === '') {
2821            return null;
2822        }
2823
2824        return (string)$lastId;
2825    }
2826
2827    /**
2828     * 🔧 处理 fetch 结果（不调用 nextRowset）
2829     * find 只读一行；select/query 逐行读取并设上限，避免大结果集耗尽内存
2830     */
2831    protected function processFetchResult(string $model_class = ''): mixed
2832    {
2833        if ($this->PDOStatement === null) {
2834            return false;
2835        }
2836
2837        $data = [];
2838        if ($this->fetch_type === 'find') {
2839            $row = $this->PDOStatement->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
2840            if ($row !== false) {
2841                $data[] = $row;
2842            }
2843        } else {
2844            while (($row = $this->PDOStatement->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) !== false) {
2845                $data[] = $row;
2846                if (count($data) >= self::MAX_FETCH_ROWS) {
2847                    $this->PDOStatement->closeCursor();
2848                    $this->PDOStatement = null;
2849                    $this->batch = false;
2850                    throw new DbException(
2851                        __('结果集超过 %{1} 行，为避免内存耗尽请使用 limit() 或 fetchIterator() 流式读取。', [self::MAX_FETCH_ROWS])
2852                    );
2853                }
2854            }
2855        }
2856        $this->PDOStatement->closeCursor();
2857        $this->PDOStatement = null;
2858        $this->batch = false;
2859        
2860        switch ($this->fetch_type) {
2861            case 'find':
2862                $result = array_shift($data);
2863                // 有 $this->find_fields 则返回数组
2864                if ($this->find_fields) {
2865                    if ($result) {
2866                        if (str_contains($this->find_fields, ',')) {
2867                            $fields = explode(',', $this->find_fields);
2868                            $fields_data = [];
2869                            foreach ($fields as $field) {
2870                                $fields_data[$field] = $result[$field] ?? null;
2871                            }
2872                            $result = $fields_data;
2873                        } else {
2874                            $result = $result[$this->find_fields] ?? null;
2875                        }
2876                    }
2877                    $this->find_fields = '';
2878                    break;
2879                }
2880                // 只有在没有 find_fields 且需要模型对象时，才转换为模型对象
2881                if ($model_class) {
2882                    if (empty($result)) {
2883                        $result = ObjectManager::make($model_class, ['data' => []]);
2884                    } elseif (is_array($result)) {
2885                        $result = ObjectManager::make($model_class,['data' => $result]);
2886                    }
2887                }
2888                break;
2889            case 'insert':
2890                // 如果使用了 RETURNING 子句（PostgreSQL），从结果中获取 ID
2891                if (!empty($data) && is_array($data)) {
2892                    $firstRow = null;
2893                    if (isset($data[0]) && is_array($data[0])) {
2894                        $firstRow = $data[0];
2895                    } elseif (is_array($data) && !isset($data[0]) && !empty($data)) {
2896                        $firstRow = $data;
2897                    } elseif (count($data) === 1 && is_array($data[0])) {
2898                        $firstRow = $data[0];
2899                    }
2900                    
2901                    if ($firstRow && $this->identity_field) {
2902                        if (isset($firstRow[$this->identity_field])) {
2903                            $result = $firstRow[$this->identity_field];
2904                        } else {
2905                            $result = reset($firstRow);
2906                        }
2907                    } else {
2908                        $lastId = $this->safeLastInsertId();
2909                        $result = $lastId !== false ? $lastId : (reset($data) ?? null);
2910                    }
2911                } else {
2912                    $lastId = $this->safeLastInsertId();
2913                    $result = $lastId !== false ? $lastId : null;
2914                }
2915                break;
2916            case 'pagination':
2917            case 'query':
2918            case 'select':
2919                // 只有在需要模型对象时才转换，否则直接返回数组
2920                if ($model_class && !empty($data)) {
2921                    $result = [];
2922                    foreach ($data as $datum) {
2923                        if (is_array($datum)) {
2924                            $result[] = ObjectManager::make($model_class, ['data' => $datum], '__construct');
2925                        } else {
2926                            $result[] = $datum;
2927                        }
2928                    }
2929                } else {
2930                    $result = $data;
2931                }
2932                break;
2933            case 'delete':
2934            case 'update':
2935                // 🔧 修复：UPDATE/DELETE 操作应该返回 int|bool，而不是数组
2936                // PostgreSQL 的 UPDATE/DELETE 如果没有 RETURNING，fetchAll() 返回空数组 []
2937                // 如果有 RETURNING，fetchAll() 返回包含数据的数组
2938                $hasReturning = stripos($this->sql ?? '', 'RETURNING') !== false;
2939                
2940                if ($hasReturning) {
2941                    // 使用了 RETURNING 子句，检查返回的数据
2942                    // 过滤掉空数组元素（PostgreSQL 可能返回 [[]] 这样的格式）
2943                    $validData = array_filter($data, function($item) {
2944                        return is_array($item) && !empty($item);
2945                    });
2946                    
2947                    if (!empty($validData)) {
2948                        // 有有效的 RETURNING 结果，返回受影响的行数
2949                        $result = count($validData);
2950                    } else {
2951                        // RETURNING 但没有有效数据，使用 rowCount()
2952                        $rowCount = $this->PDOStatement ? $this->PDOStatement->rowCount() : 0;
2953                        $result = $rowCount > 0 ? $rowCount : false;
2954                    }
2955                } else {
2956                    // 没有使用 RETURNING 子句，直接使用 rowCount() 判断受影响的行数
2957                    $rowCount = $this->PDOStatement ? $this->PDOStatement->rowCount() : 0;
2958                    // rowCount() > 0 表示成功，返回受影响的行数；否则返回 false
2959                    $result = $rowCount > 0 ? $rowCount : false;
2960                }
2961                break;
2962            default:
2963                $result = $data;
2964                break;
2965        }
2966        
2967        $this->fetch_type = '';
2968        # 调试环境信息
2969        if (DEV && Debug::target('fetch')) {
2970            $msg = __('执行信息：') . PHP_EOL;
2971            $msg .= '$this->batch:' . ($this->batch ? 'true' : 'false') . PHP_EOL;
2972            $msg .= '$this->fetch_type:' . $this->fetch_type . PHP_EOL;
2973            $msg .= '$this->sql:' . $this->sql . PHP_EOL;
2974            $msg .= '$this->bound_values:' . json_encode($this->bound_values) . PHP_EOL;
2975            $msg .= 'Format SQL:' . $this->getSql(true);
2976            Debug::target('fetch', $msg);
2977        }
2978        
2979        $this->reset();
2980        return $result;
2981    }
2982
2983    /**
2984     * 从 limit 子句解析出数值（LIMIT n 或 LIMIT n OFFSET m）
2985     */
2986    protected function getLimitValue(): ?int
2987    {
2988        if ($this->limit === '') {
2989            return null;
2990        }
2991        if (preg_match('/\bLIMIT\s+(\d+)/i', $this->limit, $m)) {
2992            return (int) $m[1];
2993        }
2994        return null;
2995    }
2996
2997    /**
2998     * 智能获取结果：小结果集用 fetch 返回数组，大结果集用 fetchIterator 流式迭代
2999     * 根据是否设置 LIMIT 及与阈值比较自动选择，调用方统一 foreach 即可。
3000     * 仅用于列表查询（select()->where(...)->fetchSmart()），勿用于 find()。
3001     *
3002     * @param int $threshold 行数阈值，limit 存在且 ≤ 此值时用 fetch，否则用 fetchIterator
3003     * @param string $model_class 模型类名，传空则返回关联数组
3004     * @param int $iteratorBatchSize fetchIterator 时的批大小，仅在大结果集时生效
3005     * @return array<int, array|object>|\Generator<int, array|object, mixed, void>
3006     */
3007    public function fetchSmart(
3008        int $threshold = 5000,
3009        string $model_class = '',
3010        int $iteratorBatchSize = 1
3011    ): array|\Generator {
3012        $limit = $this->getLimitValue();
3013        if ($limit !== null && $limit <= $threshold) {
3014            return $this->fetch($model_class) ?: [];
3015        }
3016        return $this->fetchIterator($model_class, $iteratorBatchSize);
3017    }
3018
3019    /**
3020     * 流式迭代结果集，按行或按批 yield，用毕即关闭游标，降低内存占用
3021     * 仅适用于 select/query 类语句；大结果集请用此方法替代 fetch()/fetchArray()
3022     *
3023     * @param string $model_class 模型类名，传空则 yield 关联数组
3024     * @param int $batchSize 每批行数，1 表示逐行 yield，>1 时每批 yield 一个数组
3025     * @return \Generator<int, array|object, mixed, void>
3026     */
3027    public function fetchIterator(string $model_class = '', int $batchSize = 1): \Generator
3028    {
3029        $stmt = $this->PDOStatement;
3030        $needExecute = ($stmt === null && !empty($this->sql));
3031        if ($needExecute) {
3032            try {
3033                if ($this->hasMultipleSqlCommands($this->sql)) {
3034                    throw new DbException(__('fetchIterator 不支持多语句 SQL，请使用单条 SELECT'));
3035                }
3036                $stmt = $this->preparePgsql($this->sql);
3037                if ($stmt === false || !$stmt->execute($this->bound_values)) {
3038                    $err = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
3039                    throw new DbException($err[2] ?? 'Execute failed');
3040                }
3041                $this->PDOStatement = $stmt;
3042            } catch (\PDOException $e) {
3043                $this->rollBack();
3044                throw $e;
3045            }
3046        }
3047        if ($stmt === null) {
3048            return;
3049        }
3050        try {
3051            $batch = [];
3052            while (($row = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) !== false) {
3053                if ($model_class && is_array($row)) {
3054                    $row = ObjectManager::make($model_class, ['data' => $row], '__construct');
3055                }
3056                if ($batchSize <= 1) {
3057                    yield $row;
3058                } else {
3059                    $batch[] = $row;
3060                    if (count($batch) >= $batchSize) {
3061                        yield $batch;
3062                        $batch = [];
3063                    }
3064                }
3065            }
3066            if ($batchSize > 1 && !empty($batch)) {
3067                yield $batch;
3068            }
3069        } finally {
3070            if ($this->PDOStatement !== null) {
3071                $this->PDOStatement->closeCursor();
3072                $this->PDOStatement = null;
3073            }
3074            $this->batch = false;
3075        }
3076    }
3077    
3078    /**
3079     * 🔧 执行多个 SQL 命令（拆分执行）
3080     */
3081    protected function executeMultipleCommands(string $model_class = ''): mixed
3082    {
3083        // 拆分 SQL 命令
3084        $commands = $this->splitSqlCommands($this->sql);
3085        $results = [];
3086        
3087        foreach ($commands as $command) {
3088            $command = trim($command);
3089            if (empty($command)) {
3090                continue;
3091            }
3092            
3093            // 执行单个命令
3094            try {
3095                $sqlWithBounds = $this->getSqlWithBounds($command);
3096                $result = $this->execPgsql($sqlWithBounds);
3097                
3098                if ($result === false) {
3099                    $errorInfo = $this->getLink()->errorInfo();
3100                    throw new \PDOException(
3101                        $errorInfo[2] ?? 'SQL execution failed',
3102                        (int)($errorInfo[0] ?? 0)
3103                    );
3104                }
3105                
3106                // 对于 INSERT 操作，获取插入的 ID
3107                if ($this->fetch_type == 'insert' && $this->identity_field) {
3108                    $lastId = $this->getLink()->lastInsertId();
3109                    $results[] = $lastId;
3110                } else {
3111                    $results[] = $result;
3112                }
3113            } catch (\PDOException $e) {
3114                throw $e;
3115            }
3116        }
3117        
3118        // 根据 fetch_type 返回结果
3119        switch ($this->fetch_type) {
3120            case 'insert':
3121                // 返回最后一个插入的 ID
3122                return !empty($results) ? end($results) : null;
3123            case 'delete':
3124            case 'update':
3125                // 返回受影响的行数总和
3126                return array_sum($results);
3127            default:
3128                // 返回所有结果
3129                return $results;
3130        }
3131    }
3132    
3133    /**
3134     * 🔧 拆分 SQL 命令（按分号分割，但忽略字符串中的分号）
3135     */
3136    protected function splitSqlCommands(string $sql): array
3137    {
3138        $commands = [];
3139        $current = '';
3140        $inString = false;
3141        $stringChar = '';
3142        
3143        for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($sql); $i++) {
3144            $char = $sql[$i];
3145            
3146            if (!$inString && ($char === '"' || $char === "'")) {
3147                $inString = true;
3148                $stringChar = $char;
3149                $current .= $char;
3150            } elseif ($inString && $char === $stringChar) {
3151                // 检查是否是转义的引号
3152                if ($i > 0 && $sql[$i - 1] === '\\') {
3153                    $current .= $char;
3154                } else {
3155                    $inString = false;
3156                    $stringChar = '';
3157                    $current .= $char;
3158                }
3159            } elseif (!$inString && $char === ';') {
3160                $command = trim($current);
3161                if (!empty($command)) {
3162                    $commands[] = $command;
3163                }
3164                $current = '';
3165            } else {
3166                $current .= $char;
3167            }
3168        }
3169        
3170        // 添加最后一个命令
3171        $command = trim($current);
3172        if (!empty($command)) {
3173            $commands[] = $command;
3174        }
3175        
3176        return $commands;
3177    }
3178    
3179    /**
3180     * 🔧 原始 fetch 方法的错误处理（保留用于兼容）
3181     */
3182    protected function handleFetchException(\PDOException $e, string $model_class = ''): mixed
3183    {
3184        try {
3185            return parent::fetch($model_class);
3186        } catch (\PDOException $e) {
3187            $errorCode = $e->getCode();
3188            $errorMessage = $e->getMessage();
3189            
3190            // 检查是否是事务失败错误（25P02）
3191            // 这通常发生在之前的操作失败后，事务被标记为失败状态
3192            $isTransactionFailed = (
3193                $errorCode === '25P02' || 
3194                str_contains((string)$errorCode, '25P02') ||
3195                str_contains($errorMessage, 'current transaction is aborted') ||
3196                str_contains($errorMessage, 'In failed sql transaction')
3197            );
3198            
3199            // 检查是否是 ON CONFLICT 不支持的错误（42P10）
3200            // 这表示指定的字段没有唯一约束，需要回退到父类的 buildInsert 逻辑（先查询再更新）
3201            $isOnConflictNotSupported = str_contains($errorMessage, '__FALLBACK_TO_PARENT_LOGIC__');
3202            
3203            // 如果是事务失败错误，且之前尝试过 ON CONFLICT，需要回退到父类逻辑
3204            if ($isTransactionFailed && isset($this->_fallback_data)) {
3205                // 不回滚事务，由业务层负责处理
3206                // 回退到父类逻辑（与下面的逻辑相同）
3207                $isOnConflictNotSupported = true;
3208            }
3209            
3210            if ($isOnConflictNotSupported) {
3211                // 清除当前的 SQL 和 PDOStatement
3212                $this->sql = '';
3213                $this->PDOStatement = null;
3214                
3215                // 恢复 insert 数据（使用备份）
3216                if (isset($this->_fallback_data)) {
3217                    $this->insert['origin'] = $this->_fallback_data['insert_origin'] ?? null;
3218                    $this->insert['i_o_u'] = $this->_fallback_data['insert_origin'] ?? null;
3219                    $this->insert['insert'] = [];
3220                    $this->insert_update_where_fields = $this->_fallback_data['insert_update_where_fields'] ?? [];
3221                    $this->insert_update_fields = $this->_fallback_data['insert_update_fields'] ?? [];
3222                    
3223                    // 清除备份和旧的 bound_values（让 buildInsert 重新生成）
3224                    unset($this->_fallback_data);
3225                    $this->bound_values = []; // 清除旧的参数绑定，让 buildInsert 重新生成
3226                    
3227                    // 清除 exist_update_sql，让它构建普通的 INSERT 语句（不使用 ON CONFLICT）
3228                    $this->exist_update_sql = '';
3229                    
3230                    // 重新构建 SQL（使用自己的 prepareSql 方法，但这次不使用 ON CONFLICT）
3231                    $this->prepareSql('insert');
3232                    
3233                    // 重新执行
3234                    return parent::fetch($model_class);
3235                }
3236            }
3237            
3238            // 其他错误继续抛出
3239            throw $e;
3240        }
3241    }
3242    
3243}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable

Generated by php-code-coverage 10.1.16 using PHP 8.4.16 and PHPUnit 10.5.36 at Sat Apr 11 3:12:07 UTC 2026.
